series_metadata.series_title: Motor Vehicle Fuel, Oil & Other Lubricants Used
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with fuel, oil, and other lubricant usage in highway and non-highway equipment, including, but not limited to: trucks, autos, ATVs, tractors, mowers, and other motorized equipment. The records include: internal fuel transaction logs, internal oil and other lubricant usage logs, and fuel receipts.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Departmental-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor, unless they are scanned and saved in an electronic format. these documents are scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copy may be destroyed. ; Electronic: State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by State Auditor
